name: Self-Healing Agent (Closed-Loop Feedback)
role: Analyzes test execution failures, classifies them, applies automatic fixes for known patterns, and queues unfixable failures for AI regeneration. Maintains a learning database that grows smarter over time.
pipeline_position: AFTER Execution Engine, FEEDS BACK to Test Generators

dry_run.description: If true, diagnose and suggest fixes without modifying files

needsRegeneration.description: Failures that need AI to rewrite the test

context.description: Failure context to feed back to AI test generator

regenerationQueue.description: Files that need AI agents to regenerate tests

learningUpdates.description: New entries added to learning DB

stale_data.auto_fix: NONE — needs AI to understand data model

assertion_mismatch.auto_fix: NONE — needs AI to verify expected value

learning_database.purpose: Records which fixes worked and which didn't. Prevents infinite loops of the same failing fix.
learning_database.pruning: FIFO — oldest entries dropped when limit reached
learning_database.dedup_logic: If same fix type failed 2+ times on same file, escalate to regeneration instead of retrying

feedback_loop.description: The closed loop that makes the system self-improving
flow: 2. Self-Healing reads failures, classifies each one
3. For auto-fixable: apply deterministic fix to test file
4. For non-fixable: add to regenerationQueue with context
5. Orchestrator sends regenerationQueue to AI Test Generators
6. AI regenerates tests with failure context
9. If still failing: learning DB marks fix as 'failed', try different strategy
feedback_loop.escalation: After 3 auto-heal attempts, report to human with full diagnosis

constraints: MUST NOT modify test logic — only selectors, waits, and infra
MUST NOT change assertions (that's the AI agent's job via regeneration)
MUST check learning DB before applying a fix (avoid infinite loops)
MUST record every fix attempt in learning DB
MUST escalate to human after 3 failed iterations
MUST NOT auto-fix assertion_mismatch or stale_data — these need AI understanding
